title: Jacob Sartorius: Life on the Road
original_title: Jacob Sartorius: Life on the Road
overview: Jacob Sartorius. Started as a little boy from Virginia to a talented over- achieving 14 year old teen. Jacob Sartorius' "Life on the Road" shows his life during shows and on tour, making a difference to the world. With music.
